feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: What kinos does she watch?

entry.title: /int/ International: Japan appreciation post
entry.content: https://www.mv.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr top_en/index.html We should appreciate japan more. They are the only country giving aid without scamming us or getting anything in return. Check out the embassy website. They donate lots of equipment, constantly. They had actually donated a bariatric chamber, that the sifain could have used to save that diver during the cave rescue thing. Its the kind of thing they should have had on the diving boat. but alas it was nowhere to be seen. Everything is probably s
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: The Unity will bring about the master race. Master! Master! One able to survive,…
entry.content: The Unity will bring about the master race. Master! Master! One able to survive, or even thrive, in the wasteland. As long as there are differences, we will tear ourselves apart fighting each other. We need one race. Race! Race! One goal. Goal! Goal! One people . . . to move forward to our destiny. Destiny
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wann…
entry.content: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wanna play above the lowest rank >Out of those handful 2-3 are clearly Dev pets and never get nerfed >If you want to play them you need to invest hundreds of hours of our ever fleeting lives into mastering them >Once you do they'll finally get nerfed into obscurity and you have to start over I don't understand people who play the ASSFAGGOTS genre. Getting an actual job would be less time intensive and more rewarding.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2999
entry.content: >Sad Dragon Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84058277/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.

entry.title: /int/ International: >school "trip" for a whole week >have to commute for six (6) hours per day in to…
entry.content: >school "trip" for a whole week >have to commute for six (6) hours per day in total >will be away for 15 hours from home >public transport is as shit as always >gotta do this for five (5) days Holy shit, why can't we have those fast trains like they do in Japan that go at the speed of light... Why do we have to bother with these shitty ass trains that are equally as fast as steam engines from the 19th century? And they have the audacity to always be fucking late too. Fuck the Deutsche Bahn. FUCK
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: I don't think it's a good idea for white europeans to cope out being replaced by blacks in sports by saying "well we just care about rugby and darts anyway." You're basically just surrendering and retreating to another sport. Soccer used to be mostly white in your countries too you know. And given that in American football, which is somewhat close to rugby, most players are black, there's no reason to think that blacks won't replace you there eventually as well. Even a fancy sport like golf got

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The MAID transport train dropped you into the outskirts of the containment zone …
entry.content: The MAID transport train dropped you into the outskirts of the containment zone this morning. You’ve been wandering the hollow streets of the repurposed town for hours. The outskirts are completely empty and silent and the buildings slowly decaying. Eventually you spot a young man, barefoot (pic related), leaning against the wall of an abandoned garage. He laughs and informs you that the cleanup crews never pass through this part of town and if you want to get put down, you need to go to the tow
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.content: Living In The Material World [Apple, 1973] If you want to call this living. George sings as if he's doing a sitar impression and several people in the room, including a little man in my head I'd never noticed before, expressed their relief when I turned the damned thing off during "Be Here Now." Inspirational verse: "The leaders of nations/Are acting like big girls." C

entry.title: /g/ Technology: microsofts CSAM problem
entry.content: https://itsfoss.com/news/windows-11 -cam-bug/ windows 11 is capable of filling entire 500GB NVME SSD due to a bug CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal.exe fills entire drive if you not careful But it can still be deleted Press Win + I, go to System > Recovery, and click Restart now next to Advanced startup. When it restarts, navigate to Troubleshoot > Advanced options > Startup Settings > Restart, and press 4 or F4 to enter Safe Mode. Delete the Folder: Open File Explorer and go to C:\ProgramData\Micr
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: My story
entry.content: ve never posted anything like this before and I’m still not sure I should, but I’m 21 and I’ve been carrying this since I was a kid and I need to say it out loud somewhere. When I was between 4 and 12 my uncle used to watch me a lot on weekends. At first it was just him being “affectionate” in ways that felt wrong, then it turned into him touching me under my clothes, making me touch him, and eventually full sex. He would take me into his room or the basement, tell me it was our secret, that I w
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Why do people post random images/youtube links in my threads that are on page 11…

entry.title: /news/ News: Juan For the Road
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/maine- shooting-ice-biddeford/ A person was killed during a shooting in Maine involving U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement on Monday morning, state House Speaker Ryan Fecteau said. The Maine Immigrants' Rights Coalition identified the person who was shot as a 26-year-old Colombian man who was authorized to work in the U.S. and had been issued a Social Security number. The police department in Biddeford, Maine, said in a statement that it responded to an inciden
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Nonnies, this is how you fix Tor.
entry.content: Open your torrc and add the next lines to it, to block 14 eyes, surveillance states, and countries that block Tor. ExcludeNodes {us},{um},{vi},{gb},{ca},{au},{de}, {fr},{be},{nl},{dk},{no},{se},{it}, {es},{il},{jp},{kr},{tw},{sg},{th}, {cn},{ru},{by},{ir},{kp} StrictNodes 1 If you want to, you can explicitly use nodes from the best countries for privacy. ExitNodes {ch},{is},{fi},{ro}
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise thei

It wasn't extremely weird or anything. It's juz whenever dat happens, all I can think afterwards is dat I want to kill myself. I'm physically cringing at dis fact. entry.title: /o/ Auto: It's wild that you take one test as a teenager and then you're licensed for life…
entry.content: It's wild that you take one test as a teenager and then you're licensed for life. Whenever i want to rage at other drivers, I have remind myself that we share the road with: the elderly, people with disabilities (including diagnosed mental retardation), drug addicts, schizophrenics, and women. My gut tells me that requiring a driving exam every 5 years would be un-American, but our current system is so impractical. We need to get these incompetent drivers off the road.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Chat Control - The Truth
entry.content: The EU will scan absolutely every message sent over the Internet and they say it's to protect children on social media. Kids shouldn't use smartphones and social media in the first place so it's a weird justification for totalitarian control. But I have a wild new theory as to why They are implementing this. It's to kill off small social media sites. I've coded my own social media site from scratch and I'm trying to promote the early 2000s way of life where instead of everyone using the same gig
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why has it gotten so bad?
entry.content: it boggles my mind how people are shilling shitty pixels just for "muh graphene" as a panic response to sideloading/age check laws. all because 30 minutes in ADB to install lineage is too scary, and they don't get how GMS is separate from AOSP.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how to secure an android device
entry.content: 1. install a custom rom as the stock rom can never be secure 2. enable full disk encryption if possible 3. delink the fde password that's also tied to the lockscreen password and set a new lockscreen passowrd or pin 4. set screen timeout to 15 seconds 5. install only foss apps from places like fdroid, etc 6. switch to a launcher that hides all your apps like µlauncher 7. install apps like wrongpinshutdown and duress to secure your lockscreen once done your homescreen should look something like t
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is there an anti-AI Youtube Extension yet?
entry.content: It's 2026 and there's still no add-on that marks or hides videos as AI slop. Like why is there no uBlock or Sponsorblock, but for AI videos entirely. AI is the new ad spam of the 2020s. YouTube is totally flooded with AI slop, Google encourages it for some reason, and it's getting worse and worse as the months go by.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: so real talk, what happened to the days where people actually loved subscription…
entry.content: so real talk, what happened to the days where people actually loved subscriptions and loved minimilism to the point it was just a bed and a TV or a couch and a TV? Why are people all of a sudden acting like they want to own stuff? I for one welcome a society where I just put on a VR headset and all the things that would be in my room are just in the VR headset instead, or have a subscription to rent a computer rather then worry about my pc breaking and not being able to get a new video card/ram.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: I can't make up my fucking mind which fucking car to buy. There are too fucking many to choose from. I fucking hate this.

entry.title: /int/ International: Does your country have its own variant of "izzat"? Yeah. I got no idea what it's…
entry.content: Does your country have its own variant of "izzat"? Yeah. I got no idea what it's called, but if you see somebody who looks menacing, you shouldn't try to correct their behavior. In fact, you shouldn't try to correct anybody's actions here in Mexico except for those of your own children, unless you wanna risk getting stabbed or shot. Also, nepotism and political corruption are seen as the norm - the way to get by, rather than as exceptional states that should be frowned upon. It's expected that p
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: In Dark Souls 2, there are nine (9) different bosses you can fight as your first…
entry.content: In Dark Souls 2, there are nine (9) different bosses you can fight as your first boss encounter. Old FromSoft really were the kings of player choice.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
